lessons.name: Review 1 (Units 1 - 3)
lessons.description: Consolidation of vocabulary and grammar from Units 1, 2, and 3.

sections.heading: I. Language - Ôn tập ngôn ngữ
sections.content:
A. Pronunciation (Phát âm)

Unit 1: Stress in three-syllable words

  • Trọng âm thường rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất (danh từ/tính từ) hoặc thứ hai (động từ)
  • Ex: ADmirable, adMIRE, dediCAtion, contriBUtion

Unit 2: Stress in four-syllable words

  • Trọng âm thường rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai hoặc thứ ba
  • Ex: mulTIcultural, discrimiNAtion, inTEgration

Unit 3: Linking sounds

  • Consonant + Vowel: liên kết trực tiếp
  • Ex: turn off → turnoff, pick up → pickup

B. Vocabulary (Từ vựng)

Unit 1: Life Stories We Admire

  • Qualities: admire, dedication, perseverance, determination, courage
  • Achievements: achievement, contribution, legacy, pioneer, influential
  • Challenges: overcome, struggle, obstacle, hardship

Unit 2: A Multicultural World

  • Culture: multicultural, diversity, tradition, custom, heritage, identity
  • Integration: integrate, immigrant, assimilate, tolerance
  • Issues: discrimination, ethnic, celebrate

Unit 3: Green Living

  • The 3Rs: reduce, reuse, recycle
  • Energy: sustainable, renewable, solar panel, emission, carbon footprint
  • Products: eco-friendly, biodegradable, organic
  • Actions: conserve, turn off, cut down on, pick up

C. Grammar (Ngữ pháp)

Unit 1: Past Simple & Past Continuous

  • Past Simple: hành động đã hoàn thành (yesterday, last week, ago, in + year)
  • Ex: Marie Curie won two Nobel Prizes.
  • Past Continuous: hành động đang xảy ra tại thời điểm trong quá khứ
  • Ex: She was studying when I called.
  • Kết hợp: Past Continuous + when + Past Simple
  • Ex: I was reading when she arrived.

Unit 2: Articles (A, An, The, Zero article)

  • A/An: lần đầu nhắc, trước danh từ số ít đếm được
  • Ex: I met an immigrant from Vietnam.
  • The: đã nhắc đến, duy nhất, so sánh nhất
  • Ex: The United States, the most diverse country
  • Zero article: danh từ số nhiều/không đếm được nói chung, tên nước, ngôn ngữ, bữa ăn
  • Ex: Ø Diversity is important. / speak Ø English / have Ø breakfast

Unit 3: Phrasal Verbs & Relative Pronoun 'which'

  • Phrasal verbs: turn off, cut down on, give up, pick up, throw away, run out of
  • Với đại từ: Turn it off (NOT: Turn off it)
  • Which: thay thế cho vật/sự việc
  • Ex: Solar panels, which convert sunlight, are eco-friendly.
  • Ex: He recycles, which is responsible. (which = việc anh ấy tái chế)

sections.heading: II. Skills - Ôn tập kỹ năng
sections.content:
A. Reading (Đọc hiểu)

Kỹ năng cần ôn tập:

  • Đọc lướt để nắm ý chính (skimming)
  • Đọc kỹ để tìm thông tin chi tiết (scanning)
  • Đoán nghĩa từ vựng qua ngữ cảnh
  • Hiểu ý chính và ý phụ của đoạn văn
  • Xác định thông tin đúng/sai
  • Suy luận và rút ra kết luận

Chủ đề đã đọc:

  • Biographies of inspiring people (Marie Curie, Nelson Mandela)
  • Multicultural societies (Canada, Australia, Singapore)
  • Green living and sustainable development

B. Speaking (Nói)

Chủ đề đã học:

  • Talking about people you admire
  • Discussing cultural diversity and integration
  • Talking about green living practices

Useful expressions:

  • I admire... because... / What I admire most is...
  • He/She was born in... / He/She overcame...
  • In my opinion, cultural diversity...
  • We should respect/embrace...
  • I try to... / We should turn off/cut down on...
  • It's important to...

C. Listening (Nghe hiểu)

Kỹ năng cần ôn tập:

  • Nghe để nắm ý chính
  • Nghe để tìm thông tin cụ thể
  • Điền thông tin còn thiếu (gap-filling)
  • Trả lời câu hỏi chi tiết
  • Ghi chú các ý quan trọng (note-taking)
  • Hiểu thái độ và ý kiến của người nói

Chủ đề đã nghe:

  • Talks about inspiring life stories
  • Discussions about multicultural communities
  • Presentations about green living tips

D. Writing (Viết)

Dạng bài đã học:

  • Writing biographies of admired people
  • Writing articles about cultural diversity
  • Writing proposals about green living

Kỹ năng viết:

  • Tổ chức bài viết: Introduction - Body - Conclusion
  • Sử dụng thì quá khứ đơn và quá khứ tiếp diễn
  • Sử dụng mạo từ chính xác
  • Sử dụng phrasal verbs và relative clauses
  • Viết câu đa dạng và mạch lạc

Cấu trúc bài viết mẫu:

  • Introduction: Giới thiệu chủ đề (1-2 câu)
  • Body: Trình bày ý chính (2-3 đoạn với supporting details)
  • Conclusion: Kết luận và nhấn mạnh ý chính (1-2 câu)

problemTypes.name: Mixed Exercise
problemTypes.method: Review all grammar points and vocabulary from Units 1, 2, and 3.

exercises.passage:
Marie Curie was born in Warsaw, Poland, in 1867. Despite facing many obstacles as a woman in science, she became one of the most influential scientists in history. She moved to Paris to study physics and mathematics at the Sorbonne University, where she met her future husband, Pierre Curie.

Together, Marie and Pierre conducted groundbreaking research on radioactivity. In 1903, Marie became the first woman to win a Nobel Prize in Physics, sharing it with Pierre and Henri Becquerel. After Pierre's tragic death in 1906, Marie continued her research with even greater determination. In 1911, she won a second Nobel Prize, this time in Chemistry, becoming the first person ever to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.

Marie Curie's dedication to science and her perseverance in the face of discrimination inspired generations of scientists, especially women. She died in 1934 from aplastic anemia, likely caused by prolonged exposure to radiation during her research. Her legacy continues to influence science and society today.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Marie Curie's achievements and contributions to science
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn tập trung vào những thành tựu và đóng góp của Marie Curie cho khoa học.

questions.question: What made Marie Curie unique in Nobel Prize history?
options: She won Nobel Prizes in two different sciences
questions.explanation: Marie Curie là người đầu tiên giành giải Nobel ở hai lĩnh vực khoa học khác nhau.

questions.question: The word 'obstacles' in paragraph 1 is closest in meaning to ______.
questions.explanation: Obstacles = challenges and difficulties (trở ngại, khó khăn).

questions.question: What happened after Pierre Curie's death?
options: Marie continued her research with greater determination
questions.explanation: Sau cái chết của Pierre, Marie tiếp tục nghiên cứu với quyết tâm lớn hơn.

questions.question: According to the passage, Marie Curie died from ______.
options: aplastic anemia caused by radiation exposure
questions.explanation: Marie Curie chết vì bệnh thiếu máu bất sản do tiếp xúc với phóng xạ.

exercises.passage:
In today's globalized world, cultural diversity has become increasingly important. A multicultural society is one where people from different ethnic backgrounds, religions, and traditions live together. Countries like Canada, Australia, and Singapore are known for their multicultural populations.

Cultural diversity brings many benefits to society. It enriches our understanding of different perspectives and ways of life. When people from various cultures interact, they share ideas, foods, music, and traditions, creating a vibrant and dynamic community. This exchange promotes creativity and innovation in many fields, from business to the arts.

However, multicultural societies also face challenges. Language barriers, discrimination, and misunderstandings can create tensions between different groups. To build a truly harmonious multicultural society, people need to practice tolerance, respect, and open-mindedness. Education plays a crucial role in teaching young people to appreciate diversity and embrace differences rather than fear them.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: Cultural diversity has both benefits and challenges
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói về cả lợi ích và thách thức của đa dạng văn hóa.

questions.question: According to the passage, what do people share in multicultural societies?
questions.explanation: Trong xã hội đa văn hóa, mọi người chia sẻ ý tưởng, thức ăn, âm nhạc và truyền thống.

questions.question: The word 'vibrant' in paragraph 2 is closest in meaning to ______.
questions.explanation: Vibrant = lively and energetic (sôi động, tràn đầy năng lượng).

questions.question: What challenges do multicultural societies face?
questions.explanation: Xã hội đa văn hóa đối mặt với rào cản ngôn ngữ, phân biệt đối xử và hiểu lầm.

questions.question: According to the passage, what is crucial for building a harmonious multicultural society?
options: Education that teaches appreciation of diversity
Forcing everyone to be the same
questions.explanation: Giáo dục đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc dạy mọi người trân trọng sự đa dạng.

exercises.question: Marie Curie ______ two Nobel Prizes during her lifetime.
exercises.explanation: Won (Past Simple) - hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ với thời gian xác định.

exercises.question: She is ______ immigrant from Vietnam.
exercises.explanation: An (trước nguyên âm 'i') - lần đầu nhắc đến.

exercises.question: Please ______ the lights when you leave.
exercises.explanation: Turn off: tắt (đèn).

exercises.question: While she ______ at university, she joined the movement.
exercises.explanation: Was studying (Past Continuous) - hành động đang diễn ra trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: ______ diversity is important in modern society.
exercises.explanation: Ø (zero article) - danh từ không đếm được nói chung.

exercises.question: Solar panels, ______ convert sunlight to energy, are eco-friendly.
exercises.explanation: Which: đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho vật (solar panels).

exercises.question: I really ______ her courage and determination.
exercises.explanation: Admire (Present Simple) - sự thật hiện tại.

exercises.question: Immigrants need to ______ into society.
exercises.explanation: Integrate (v) - động từ nguyên thể sau 'need to'.

exercises.question: We should ______ plastic bags and use reusable ones.
exercises.explanation: Give up: từ bỏ.

exercises.question: I visited ______ United States last year.
exercises.explanation: The United States - tên nước có từ 'United' cần mạo từ 'the'.

exercises.question: He ______ many obstacles to achieve success.
exercises.explanation: Overcame (Past Simple) - hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: We speak ______ English at school.
exercises.explanation: Ø (zero article) - không dùng mạo từ trước tên ngôn ngữ.

exercises.question: Don't ______ recyclable materials.
exercises.explanation: Throw away: vứt bỏ.

exercises.question: While he ______ his speech, the audience ______ quietly.
exercises.explanation: Was giving / was listening (Past Continuous) - hai hành động đang xảy ra đồng thời.

exercises.question: He recycles all his waste, ______ is very responsible.
exercises.explanation: Which: thay thế cho cả mệnh đề trước đó (việc anh ấy tái chế).

exercises.question: We should ______ on plastic use to protect the environment.
exercises.explanation: Cut down on: cắt giảm.

exercises.question: She ______ when the phone rang.
exercises.explanation: Was cooking (Past Continuous) - hành động đang diễn ra khi có sự kiện khác.

exercises.question: I visited ______ Philippines last summer.
exercises.explanation: The Philippines - tên quốc gia có 's' cần mạo từ 'the'.

exercises.question: Renewable energy, ______ includes solar and wind power, is sustainable.
exercises.explanation: Which: đại từ quan hệ thay thế cho vật (renewable energy).

exercises.question: Nelson Mandela ______ for equality throughout his life.
exercises.explanation: Fought (Past Simple) - hành động trong quá khứ với 'throughout his life'.

exercises.question_text: Past Simple is used for completed actions in the past.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Past Simple dùng để diễn tả hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ.

exercises.question_text: We use 'the' before the names of most countries.
exercises.explanation: Sai. Hầu hết tên nước không dùng 'the', trừ một số trường hợp đặc biệt như The United States, The Philippines.

exercises.question_text: Phrasal verbs can be separated when used with pronouns.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Với đại từ, ta phải tách phrasal verb: Turn it off (NOT: Turn off it).

exercises.question_text: 'Which' can replace a whole clause in a sentence.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. 'Which' có thể thay thế cho cả một mệnh đề phía trước.

exercises.question_text: Past Continuous is used with specific time expressions like 'at 9pm yesterday'.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Past Continuous thường dùng với thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ.

exercises.question_text: What do we call a person who writes music? (one word)
exercises.explanation: Composer: nhà soạn nhạc.

exercises.question_text: Complete: Marie Curie ______ two Nobel Prizes. (past simple of 'win')
exercises.explanation: Won là quá khứ của 'win'.

exercises.question_text: What article do we use before 'United States'? (one word)
exercises.explanation: The United States - dùng 'the' trước tên nước có 'United'.

exercises.question_text: Complete the phrasal verb: Please turn ______ the lights. (off/on)
exercises.explanation: Turn off: tắt (đèn).

exercises.question_text: What relative pronoun do we use for things? (one word)
exercises.explanation: Which: đại từ quan hệ dùng cho vật.

exercises.question: Write a paragraph (100-120 words) about a person you admire. Include: who they are, what they did, why you admire them, and what you can learn from them.
exercises.sample_answer: The person I admire most is Malala Yousafzai, a Pakistani activist for female education. Despite being shot by the Taliban at age 15 for advocating girls' education, she survived and continued her mission with even greater determination. In 2014, at just 17 years old, she became the youngest Nobel Prize laureate. I admire Malala because of her incredible courage and dedication to education rights. She risked her life to fight for what she believed in and never gave up despite facing death. From her story, I learned that one person can make a difference in the world, and that education is a powerful tool for change. Her perseverance inspires me to stand up for my beliefs and work hard to achieve my goals.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết cần bao gồm: giới thiệu người được ngưỡng mộ, thành tựu của họ, lý do ngưỡng mộ, và bài học rút ra.

exercises.question: Write a paragraph (100-120 words) about the benefits and challenges of living in a multicultural society.
exercises.sample_answer: Living in a multicultural society offers both benefits and challenges. On the positive side, cultural diversity enriches our lives by exposing us to different languages, foods, traditions, and perspectives. This diversity promotes creativity, innovation, and mutual understanding among people. We learn to appreciate different ways of thinking and living, which makes us more open-minded and tolerant. However, multicultural societies also face challenges such as language barriers, cultural misunderstandings, and sometimes discrimination. Different values and customs can lead to conflicts if people are not willing to respect and accept each other. To overcome these challenges, we need education that promotes cultural awareness, tolerance, and respect. Overall, I believe the benefits of multiculturalism outweigh the challenges when people embrace diversity with an open heart.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết cần nêu rõ cả lợi ích và thách thức của xã hội đa văn hóa với ví dụ cụ thể.

exercises.question: Write a paragraph (100-120 words) about what you do to live a green lifestyle. Mention at least three specific actions.
exercises.sample_answer: I try to live a green lifestyle by taking several eco-friendly actions every day. First, I always carry a reusable water bottle and shopping bag to reduce plastic waste. This simple habit has helped me avoid using hundreds of plastic items each year. Second, I save energy by turning off lights and unplugging electronic devices when not in use. I also prefer natural light during the day instead of artificial lighting. Third, I participate in my school's recycling program and properly separate waste into different categories. Additionally, I use public transportation or ride my bicycle instead of asking my parents to drive me everywhere, which helps reduce carbon emissions. These actions may seem small, but I believe that if everyone makes similar efforts, we can make a significant positive impact on our environment and create a more sustainable future.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết cần đề cập ít nhất 3 hành động cụ thể về lối sống xanh với giải thích.
